backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the portfolio backend with artwork CRUD, user profiles, text content, media contacts, and blob storage for logo/cover/portrait images, all protected by role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the WhatsApp pre-filled message was updated from 'Hello Mudit Sharma' to a professional artwork inquiry message across Navigation, HeroSection, ContactSection, and Footer components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, used as a build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Khudrang Kalakaar Portfolio' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (portfolio index, admin login, admin panel) and wraps the app in a React Query provider.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Static about section displaying the artist portrait image, bio text, decorative corner accents, a floating experience badge, and a stats row with years active, projects done, and client satisfaction.
frontend/src/components/ArtworkGallery.t: Artwork gallery component that fetches artworks from the backend, converts raw Uint8Array image bytes to object URLs for display in a responsive grid, and shows a lightbox dialog on click.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Renders a contact section with three cards for Location, WhatsApp, and Instagram, fetching dynamic contact details via `useMediaContacts` and falling back to hardcoded defaults.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProjects: Displays a static list of five featured mural projects by mapping over a hardcoded `PROJECTS` array and rendering each via the `ProjectSection` component.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, and contact details (WhatsApp/Instagram), and includes a double-tap easter egg on the logo to navigate to the admin login page.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section displaying the artist's name and tagline fetched from CMS queries, with a dynamic background cover image and CTA buttons for WhatsApp and the gallery.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, desktop and mobile menus, a WhatsApp 'Hire Me' CTA, and a double-tap logo interaction that navigates to the admin login route.
frontend/src/components/ProjectSection.t: Reusable article component that renders a single project with a large image (70%) and a text panel (30%), supporting optional location, alternating layout direction, and a numbered overlay badge.
frontend/src/components/QRSection.tsx: Displays a QR code (generated via Google Charts API) linking to the artist's Instagram profile, alongside a follow CTA, with loading skeletons while contact data is fetched.
Renders a grid of seven mural/wall-art service offerings, each displayed as a card with a CheckCircle icon, title, and description.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Displays a 'Why Clients Trust Us' section with six trust-point cards highlighting experience, quality, and reliability, each with a numbered accent.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for CRUD operations on text content, artworks, logo, and cover image via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollSpy.ts: Custom hook that tracks which section ID is currently in view based on scroll position, returning the active section ID.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Poppins font and Tailwind directives, defining CSS custom properties for the design system including terracotta accent colors and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login page with hardcoded username/password validation that sets a sessionStorage flag and navigates to the admin panel on success.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: React admin panel page with tabbed UI for managing artworks (upload/edit/delete), logo, cover image, artist portrait, text content, and media contacts, using custom query hooks and toast notifications.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Poppins), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking the Khudrang Kalakaar Portfolio app, recording existing features and a pending request to replace the WhatsApp pre-filled message text across Navigation, HeroSection, ContactSection, and Footer components.
